_comment: Wither Arena Island — the Nether chapter's capstone. A Nether-native blackstone island carrying an enclosed, blast-resistant obsidian arena (skyseed:wither_arena/wither_arena): a soul-sand summoning patch, a sheltered corner with a charged respawn anchor and a bastion_treasure reward chest. The survivable venue to fight the Wither for the Nether Star -> Beacon. No theme mobs — you bring the boss. See SKYNETHERPLAN.
